raw_transcript_text:
DOCTOR: Hello Mr. Kumar, welcome back. How have you been feeling since our last visit?
PATIENT: Namaste doctor. Subah thoda headache hota hai aur dizziness lagti hai. Otherwise okay.
DOCTOR: Let's check your blood pressure first. [Checks BP] Okay, it's 152/94 mmHg. That is still high, Mr. Kumar. Are you taking your amlodipine daily?
PATIENT: Haan doctor sahib, regular le raha hoon, subah khane ke baad. Par namak thoda kam nahi kiya hai.
DOCTOR: Salty foods strictly avoid karna hoga. And we need to increase your amlodipine from 5mg to 10mg daily starting tomorrow morning. Also, please do a daily BP log for 1 week and come back to see me next Monday.
PATIENT: Theek hai doctor sahib, amlodipine 10mg kar dunga aur namak bilkul band.
